name: Phishing Link Click Tracking & Remediation
description: Tracks and remediates users who clicked phishing links from a confirmed phishing campaign. Extracts the list of users who interacted with the malicious URL from proxy or email gateway logs, loops over each affected user to force a password reset and enroll them in targeted security awareness training. After remediation, a summary report is sent to the SOC and management. Designed for post-incident remediation of phishing campaigns where link engagement is confirmed.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: Active Directory
required_integrations.reason: Force password reset for users who clicked phishing links

required_integrations.name: Web Proxy
required_integrations.reason: Query proxy logs to identify users who accessed the phishing URL
